evidence.content: MH140 Sports Sunglasses

These sports sunglasses feature 100% UV protection and Category 3 lenses to effectively block glare, offering exceptional visual clarity without slipping—even during hiking. Lightweight and comfortable, they’re ideal for casual hikers and outdoor sports enthusiasts. [UV Protection] Made with UV-blocking polycarbonate material, the lenses shield your eyes from harmful UVA and UVB rays—present year-round, regardless of season or weather—and help preserve long-term eye health. [Lens Tint Categories per ISO 12312-1 Standard] — Category 1: Light tints for low-light conditions. — Category 2: Medium tints for moderate sunlight. — Category 3: Dark tints for bright conditions (e.g., mountains, beaches); absorbs 82–92% of visible light. — Category 4: Very dark tints for extreme sunlight (e.g., high-altitude mountains); absorbs 92–97% of visible light. [Additional Notes] Decathlon’s lenses are made of impact-resistant yet scratch-prone polycarbonate. Scratches do not impair UV protection—mirror coatings and tint colors (gray, brown, etc.) are purely aesthetic; all tints provide identical protection. Choose based on personal preference. [Warranty] 2 years.
All Sports > Running > Accessories > Sunglasses

[UV Protection] Made with UV-blocking polycarbonate material, the lenses shield your eyes from harmful UVA and UVB rays—present year-round, regardless of season or weather—and help preserve long-term eye health. [Lens Tint Categories per ISO 12312-1 Standard] — Category 1: Light tints for low-light conditions. — Category 2: Medium tints for moderate sunlight. — Category 3: Dark tints for bright conditions (e.g., mountains, beaches); absorbs 82–92% of visible light. — Category 4: Very dark tints for extreme sunlight (e.g., high-altitude mountains); absorbs 92–97% of visible light. [Additional Notes] Decathlon’s lenses are made of impact-resistant yet scratch-prone polycarbonate. Scratches do not impair UV protection—mirror coatings and tint colors (gray, brown, etc.) are purely aesthetic; all tints provide identical protection. Choose based on personal preference. [Warranty] 2 years. 8789212 images/8789212/img2.png
